Quick Summary:

You and Sprout arrive at a quiet forest, where Sprout excitedly claims the spot while You calmly take in the peaceful surroundings. As they set up camp, Sprout fidgets and sorta helps while You do most of the work, steadily. A fire is lit as night falls, casting warm light and easing Sprout into a rare moment of calm. Later, wrapped in blankets beneath the stars, You and Sprout sit together in comfortable silence, content simply being there with each other.
